sections.content: Use shapes to highlight important info

sections.title: Example
sections.text:
Photosynthesis uses (sunlight) to make energy
[Main idea: Plants make food from light]

content.title: Mark These Notes
content.instruction: Circle keywords, box the main idea
content.text: The Amazon rainforest produces 20% of Earth's oxygen

sections.content: Circles and boxes = instant visual cues

sections.title: When reviewing
sections.text: Your eyes go straight to marked parts
